---
title: "16S Microbiome Profiling Report"
date: today
date-format: long

number-sections: true
highlight-style: pygments
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-title: Contents
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <style>
          /* Make all iframes responsive */
          .iframe-container {
            position: relative;
            width: 100%;
            height: 800px;
            overflow: hidden;
            margin-bottom: 1em;
          }
          .iframe-container iframe, .iframe-container embed {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            border: none;
            border-radius: 8px;
          }
          /* Fix for Bootstrap dropdowns in Quarto */
          .dropdown-menu { z-index: 1050 !important; }
          
          /* Force all table headers to be a professional dark blue */
          .table thead th, table thead th {
            background-color: #2C3E50 !important; 
            color: #ffffff !important;
            border-bottom: 2px solid #1A252F !important;
          }
          
          /* Premium Pill Selector Styles */
          .btn-outline-primary {
            border-color: #3b82f6 !important;
            color: #3b82f6 !important;
            font-weight: 600 !important;
            padding: 8px 20px !important;
            border-radius: 30px !important;
            transition: all 0.2s ease-in-out !important;
            margin: 2px !important;
          }
          .btn-outline-primary:hover, .btn-outline-primary.active {
            background-color: #3b82f6 !important;
            color: #ffffff !important;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.25) !important;
            border-color: #3b82f6 !important;
          }
          </style>
      - file: header_footer/header1.html
    include-after-body:
      - file: header_footer/footer1.html
    grid: 
      body-width: 1200px
      sidebar-width: 258px
    code-fold: false
    code-tools: false
editor: visual
---

::: {#wrn-1 .callout-important}
## Important
Please keep this interactive report inside its designated folder so the linked interactive plots and data files continue to function properly.
:::

# Project Workflow

This report details the taxonomic composition, diversity metrics, and predicted functional pathways of the microbial communities identified via 16S rRNA amplicon sequencing. Click on any section below to expand and view the details of the pipeline.

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## 1. Quality Control & Preprocessing
* **Process:** Raw sequencing reads were quality-filtered and adapters were removed using **Cutadapt**. Quality was assessed using **FastQC** and aggregated via **MultiQC**.
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## 2. ASV Inference & Taxonomy
* **Process:** The **DADA2** pipeline was used to filter, dereplicate, and denoise the reads to resolve exact Amplicon Sequence Variants (ASVs). Taxonomy was assigned against a reference database.
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## 3. Diversity Analysis
* **Process:** **Alpha diversity** (within-sample) was calculated to assess community richness and evenness. **Beta diversity** (between-sample) was analyzed using Principal Coordinates Analysis (PCoA) to identify structural shifts across groups.
:::

::: {.callout-note collapse="true"}
## 4. Biomarker & Functional Prediction
* **Process:** Differential abundance testing highlighted specific taxa driving the variations between cohorts. **PICRUSt2** was utilized to predict the metabolic and functional potential of the microbial communities based on their 16S profile.
:::

# Bioinformatic Pipeline

```{mermaid}
%%{init: {'themeVariables': { 'fontSize': '16px'}, 'flowchart': {'nodeSpacing': 40, 'rankSpacing': 50}}}%%
flowchart TD
    %% Nodes
    A[("FASTQ Raw Data")] 
    B["1. QC & Trimming<br/>(Cutadapt/FastQC)"]
    C["2. Denoising & ASVs<br/>(DADA2)"]
    D["3. Taxonomy Assignment<br/>(SILVA)"]
    E{"4. Diversity Analysis<br/>(Phyloseq)"}
    F["5. Biomarker Discovery<br/>(Differential Abundance)"]
    G["6. Functional Prediction<br/>(PICRUSt2)"]
    H["7. Visualizations<br/>(Plotly/ggplot2)"]
    I[("Final Interactive<br/>Report")]

    %% Connections
    A --> B --> C --> D --> E --> F --> G --> H --> I

    %% Styling
    classDef input fill:#2b2d42,color:#fff,stroke:none
    classDef process fill:#edf2f4,stroke:#8d99ae,color:#2b2d42
    classDef check fill:#ffddd2,stroke:#e29578,color:#2b2d42
    classDef output fill:#83c5be,stroke:#006d77,color:#fff,stroke-width:2px

    class A input
    class B,C,D,F,G,H process
    class E check
    class I output
```
# Quality Control
::: {.callout-tip}
Raw sequencing data requires initial quality control to remove low-quality bases and sequencing adapters. The MultiQC report aggregates the FastQC and Cutadapt metrics across all samples.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="iframe-container">
  <iframe src="multiqc_report.html" title="MultiQC Report" data-external="1"></iframe>
</div>
<br>
<div class="dropdown" style="margin-top: 10px;">
  <button class="btn btn-primary dropdown-toggle" type="button" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false">
    <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download QC Data
  </button>
  <ul class="dropdown-menu">
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="multiqc_report.html" download="multiqc_report.html">Full MultiQC HTML Report</a></li>
  </ul>
</div>
```

# Taxonomic Composition
::: {.callout-tip}
The relative abundance of microbial taxa across samples. Use the tabs below to switch between Phylum, Genus, and Species levels. Hover over the bars for exact percentage values.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="d-flex justify-content-center flex-wrap gap-2 mb-4">
  <button class="btn btn-outline-primary active" onclick="switchTaxa('phylum', this)">Phylum</button>
  <button class="btn btn-outline-primary" onclick="switchTaxa('class', this)">Class</button>
  <button class="btn btn-outline-primary" onclick="switchTaxa('order', this)">Order</button>
  <button class="btn btn-outline-primary" onclick="switchTaxa('family', this)">Family</button>
  <button class="btn btn-outline-primary" onclick="switchTaxa('genus', this)">Genus</button>
  <button class="btn btn-outline-primary" onclick="switchTaxa('species', this)">Species</button>
</div>

<div class="iframe-container" style="height: 850px;">
  <iframe id="taxa-iframe" src="interactive_reports/01_taxa_phylum.html" title="Taxonomic Composition" data-external="1"></iframe>
</div>

<script>
function switchTaxa(level, btn) {
  const iframe = document.getElementById('taxa-iframe');
  iframe.src = `interactive_reports/01_taxa_${level}.html`;
  
  // Update active class on buttons
  const buttons = btn.parentElement.querySelectorAll('button');
  buttons.forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
}
</script>
```

```{=html}
<br>
<div class="dropdown">
  <button class="btn btn-primary dropdown-toggle" type="button" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false">
    <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download Taxonomic Abundance Data
  </button>
  <ul class="dropdown-menu">
    <li><h6 class="dropdown-header">Raw Count Tables (TSV)</h6></li>
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="03_phyloseq/abundance_phylum.tsv" download="abundance_phylum.tsv">Phylum Level Abundance</a></li>
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="03_phyloseq/abundance_class.tsv" download="abundance_class.tsv">Class Level Abundance</a></li>
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="03_phyloseq/abundance_order.tsv" download="abundance_order.tsv">Order Level Abundance</a></li>
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="03_phyloseq/abundance_family.tsv" download="abundance_family.tsv">Family Level Abundance</a></li>
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="03_phyloseq/abundance_genus.tsv" download="abundance_genus.tsv">Genus Level Abundance</a></li>
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="03_phyloseq/abundance_species.tsv" download="abundance_species.tsv">Species Level Abundance</a></li>
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="03_phyloseq/abundance_asv.tsv" download="abundance_asv.tsv">Raw ASV Level Abundance</a></li>
    <li><hr class="dropdown-divider"></li>
    <li><h6 class="dropdown-header">Combined Format</h6></li>
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="03_phyloseq/taxa_abundance_tables.xlsx" download="taxa_abundance_tables.xlsx">All Levels (Excel Workbook)</a></li>
  </ul>
</div>
```

# Rarefaction Analysis
::: {.callout-tip}
Rarefaction curves determine if the sequencing depth was sufficient to capture the full microbial diversity. Curves that plateau indicate that further sequencing would likely not yield additional ASVs.
:::


```{=html}
<div class="d-flex justify-content-center flex-wrap gap-2 mb-4">
  <button class="btn btn-outline-primary active" onclick="switchRare('asv_observed', this)">ASV-Level Richness</button>
  <button class="btn btn-outline-primary" onclick="switchRare('genus_observed', this)">Genus-Level Richness</button>
  <button class="btn btn-outline-primary" onclick="switchRare('asv_shannon', this)">Shannon Saturation</button>
</div>

<div class="iframe-container" style="height: 600px;">
  <iframe id="rare-iframe" src="interactive_reports/02b_rarefaction_asv_observed.html" title="Rarefaction Curves" data-external="1"></iframe>
</div>

<script>
function switchRare(metric, btn) {
  const iframe = document.getElementById('rare-iframe');
  iframe.src = `interactive_reports/02b_rarefaction_${metric}.html`;
  
  // Update active class on buttons
  const buttons = btn.parentElement.querySelectorAll('button');
  buttons.forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
}
</script>
```

# Alpha Diversity (Within-Sample)
::: {.callout-tip}
Alpha diversity measures the complexity (richness and evenness) of the microbiome within a single sample. The table below the plot details the Shannon and Chao1 indices for each sample.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="iframe-container" style="height: 750px;">
  <iframe src="interactive_reports/02_alpha_diversity_with_table.html" title="Alpha Diversity" data-external="1"></iframe>
</div>
<br>
<div class="dropdown" style="margin-top: 10px;">
  <button class="btn btn-primary dropdown-toggle" type="button" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false">
    <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download Alpha Diversity Data
  </button>
  <ul class="dropdown-menu">
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="04_stats/alpha/alpha_diversity_table.tsv" download="alpha_diversity_table.tsv">Alpha Diversity Metrics (TSV)</a></li>
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="04_stats/alpha/kruskal_shannon.tsv" download="kruskal_shannon.tsv">Kruskal-Wallis Stats (TSV)</a></li>
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="04_stats/alpha/pairwise_wilcoxon_shannon.tsv" download="pairwise_wilcoxon_shannon.tsv">Pairwise Wilcoxon Comparisons (TSV)</a></li>
  </ul>
</div>
```
# Beta Diversity (Between-Sample)
::: {.callout-tip}
Beta diversity measures the structural differences between microbial communities across multiple distance metrics (e.g., Bray-Curtis for abundance, UniFrac for evolutionary distance). Samples that cluster closely together share similar microbiomes. Significance is calculated via **PERMANOVA**, and variance assumptions are validated using **PERMDISP**.
:::
```{=html}
<div class="iframe-container" style="height: 1000px;">
  <iframe src="interactive_reports/03_beta_diversity_with_stats.html" title="Beta Diversity Analysis" data-external="1"></iframe>
</div>
<br>
<div class="dropdown" style="margin-top: 10px;">
  <button class="btn btn-primary dropdown-toggle" type="button" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false">
    <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download Beta Diversity Stats & Plots
  </button>
  <ul class="dropdown-menu">
    <li><h6 class="dropdown-header">Statistical Tables</h6></li>
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="04_stats/beta/permanova_bray_curtis.tsv" download="permanova_bray_curtis.tsv">PERMANOVA - Bray-Curtis (TSV)</a></li>
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="04_stats/beta/permanova_jaccard.tsv" download="permanova_jaccard.tsv">PERMANOVA - Jaccard (TSV)</a></li>
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="04_stats/beta/permanova_weighted_unifrac.tsv" download="permanova_weighted_unifrac.tsv">PERMANOVA - Weighted UniFrac (TSV)</a></li>
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="04_stats/beta/permanova_unweighted_unifrac.tsv" download="permanova_unweighted_unifrac.tsv">PERMANOVA - Unweighted UniFrac (TSV)</a></li>
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="04_stats/beta/permdisp_bray_curtis.tsv" download="permdisp_bray_curtis.tsv">PERMDISP - Bray-Curtis (TSV)</a></li>
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="04_stats/beta/permdisp_jaccard.tsv" download="permdisp_jaccard.tsv">PERMDISP - Jaccard (TSV)</a></li>
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="04_stats/beta/permdisp_weighted_unifrac.tsv" download="permdisp_weighted_unifrac.tsv">PERMDISP - Weighted UniFrac (TSV)</a></li>
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="04_stats/beta/permdisp_unweighted_unifrac.tsv" download="permdisp_unweighted_unifrac.tsv">PERMDISP - Unweighted UniFrac (TSV)</a></li>
    <li><hr class="dropdown-divider"></li>
    <li><h6 class="dropdown-header">High-Res Ordination Plots</h6></li>
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="04_stats/beta/pcoa_bray_curtis.png" download="pcoa_bray_curtis.png">PCoA - Bray-Curtis (PNG)</a></li>
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="04_stats/beta/nmds_bray_curtis.png" download="nmds_bray_curtis.png">NMDS - Bray-Curtis (PNG)</a></li>
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="04_stats/beta/pcoa_jaccard.png" download="pcoa_jaccard.png">PCoA - Jaccard (PNG)</a></li>
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="04_stats/beta/nmds_jaccard.png" download="nmds_jaccard.png">NMDS - Jaccard (PNG)</a></li>
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="04_stats/beta/pcoa_weighted_unifrac.png" download="pcoa_weighted_unifrac.png">PCoA - Weighted UniFrac (PNG)</a></li>
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="04_stats/beta/pcoa_unweighted_unifrac.png" download="pcoa_unweighted_unifrac.png">PCoA - Unweighted UniFrac (PNG)</a></li>
  </ul>
</div>
```

# Differential Abundance (Biomarkers)
::: {.callout-important}
This section highlights the specific microbial genera driving the differences between experimental cohorts. Use the tabs below to switch between the Multi-Group overview and the Pairwise Volcano plots.
:::

```{=html}
<div class="d-flex justify-content-center flex-wrap gap-2 mb-4">
  <button class="btn btn-outline-primary active" onclick="switchDiff('multi', this)">Global Multi-Group Plot</button>
  <button class="btn btn-outline-primary" onclick="switchDiff('pairwise', this)">Pairwise Volcano Plot</button>
</div>

<div class="iframe-container" style="height: 800px;">
  <iframe id="diff-iframe" src="interactive_reports/04_diff_multi.html" title="Differential Biomarkers" data-external="1"></iframe>
</div>
<br>

<div id="diff-download-multi" class="dropdown" style="margin-top: 10px; display: block;">
  <button class="btn btn-primary dropdown-toggle" type="button" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false">
    <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download ANOVA Biomarker Data
  </button>
  <ul class="dropdown-menu">
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="04_stats/differential/differential_abundance_genus.tsv" download="differential_abundance_genus.tsv">Multi-Group ANOVA Results (TSV)</a></li>
  </ul>
</div>

<div id="diff-download-pairwise" class="dropdown" style="margin-top: 10px; display: none;">
  <button class="btn btn-primary dropdown-toggle" type="button" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false">
    <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download Pairwise Fold-Change Data
  </button>
  <ul class="dropdown-menu">
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="04_stats/differential/pairwise_differential_abundance.tsv" download="pairwise_differential_abundance.tsv">Pairwise Log2FC Results (TSV)</a></li>
  </ul>
</div>

<script>
function switchDiff(view, btn) {
  const iframe = document.getElementById('diff-iframe');
  iframe.src = `interactive_reports/04_diff_${view}.html`;
  
  if (view === 'multi') {
    document.getElementById('diff-download-multi').style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('diff-download-pairwise').style.display = 'none';
  } else {
    document.getElementById('diff-download-multi').style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('diff-download-pairwise').style.display = 'block';
  }
  
  // Update active class on buttons
  const buttons = btn.parentElement.querySelectorAll('button');
  buttons.forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
}
</script>
```

# Functional Prediction (PICRUSt2)
::: {.callout-tip}
PICRUSt2 predicts the metabolic pathways present based on the 16S profile. The heatmap displays the top most variable MetaCyc pathways, illustrating functional shifts between the microbial communities.
:::
```{=html}
<div class="iframe-container" style="height: 600px;">
  <iframe src="interactive_reports/05_functional_pathways.html" title="Functional Pathways Heatmap" data-external="1"></iframe>
</div>
<br>
<div class="dropdown" style="margin-top: 10px;">
  <button class="btn btn-primary dropdown-toggle" type="button" data-bs-toggle="dropdown" aria-expanded="false">
    <i class="bi bi-download"></i> Download Functional Data
  </button>
  <ul class="dropdown-menu">
    <li><a class="dropdown-item" href="06_picrust2/pathways_out/path_abun_unstrat.tsv" download="path_abun_unstrat.tsv">Raw Pathway Abundance (TSV)</a></li>
  </ul>
</div>
```
# References

Callahan, B. J., McMurdie, P. J., Rosen, M. J., Han, A. W., Johnson, A. J., & Holmes, S. P. (2016). DADA2: High-resolution sample inference from Illumina amplicon data. *Nature Methods*, 13(7), 581-583. https://doi.org/10.1038/nmeth.3869

Douglas, G. M., Maffei, V. J., Zaneveld, J. R., Yurgel, S. N., Brown, J. R., Taylor, C. M., ... & Langille, M. G. (2020). PICRUSt2 for prediction of metagenome functions. *Nature Biotechnology*, 38(6), 685-688. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41587-020-0548-6

Ewels, P., Magnusson, M., Lundin, S., & Käller, M. (2016). MultiQC: summarize analysis results for multiple tools and samples in a single report. *Bioinformatics*, 32(19), 3047-3048. https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btw354

Martin, M. (2011). Cutadapt removes adapter sequences from high-throughput sequencing reads. *EMBnet.journal*, 17(1), 10-12. https://doi.org/10.14806/ej.17.1.200

McMurdie, P. J., & Holmes, S. (2013). phyloseq: an R package for reproducible interactive analysis and graphics of microbiome census data. *PLoS One*, 8(4), e61217. https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pone.0061217

Oksanen, J., Blanchet, F. G., Friendly, M., Kindt, R., Legendre, P., McGlinn, D., ... & Wagner, H. (2020). vegan: Community Ecology Package. R package version 2.5-7. https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=vegan

# Software and Database Versions

To ensure computational reproducibility, the following software tools and packages were utilized in this pipeline, managed via a reproducible Pixi (Conda/Bioconda) environment:

| Software / Package | Version | Purpose |
|:---|:---|:---|
| **FastQC** | v0.12.1+ | Raw read quality assessment |
| **Cutadapt** | v5.2+ | Primer and adapter trimming |
| **MultiQC** | v1.35+ | Quality control report aggregation |
| **DADA2** (R) | v1.38.0+ | ASV inference and denoising |
| **Phyloseq** (R) | v1.54.0+ | Microbiome data handling and diversity metrics |
| **Vegan** (R) | v2.7-3+ | Ecological diversity and PERMANOVA statistics |
| **PICRUSt2** | v2.6.3+ | Metagenomic functional prediction |
| **Plotly** (R) | v4.10.4+ | Interactive HTML data visualization |
| **Quarto** | v1.4+ | Scientific report generation and rendering |

: {.striped .hover}

*Note: Taxonomy was assigned using the standard SILVA reference database for 16S rRNA sequences. Functional predictions were mapped against the MetaCyc metabolic pathway database.*
